title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF TALINGA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SINDANGAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3353 57 OG No. 7, 1199 (February 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2812, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF TALINGA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SINDANGAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Talinga in the Municipality of Sindangan, Province of Zamboanga del Norte, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Talinga.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
